title: The map of open-source GitHub
blurb: We classified every README into one of 13 flavors using keyword heuristics (no LLM). Here's the breakdown across 1,200,000 repos.

title: Which languages own which categories
blurb: Top languages within each category's top repos. Python owns ML, JS owns web, Go owns DevOps.

title: How does this thing install? Depends on the category.
blurb: Install command grouped by category. `pip install` dominates ML + data, `npm install` dominates web, `docker run` dominates devops.

title: The most lovingly documented repos on GitHub
blurb: Ranked by badge count × 3 + code-fence count. These are the README maximalists of the ecosystem.
